post.request_subtitle: Describe what you wish for and your search area
post.what_do_you_want: What do you want to do?
post.offer_description: Pif away something you don't need
post.title_placeholder: What do you want to pif?
post.description_placeholder: Describe the pif, its features and any special characteristics...
post.description_request_placeholder: Describe what you wish for and any specific requirements or preferences...
post.location_placeholder: Where can the pif be picked up?
post.search_area_placeholder: Where are you looking for the pif?
post.privacy_notice: 🔒 Privacy protection: Your exact position will never be shared. Other users only see an approximate area to protect your privacy.
post.location_tip: 💡 Tip: Specify a clear location where the receiver can pick up the pif. This makes it easier for them to assess if they can collect it.
post.search_area_description: Specify your search area (within 2 km from this point you're looking for the pif)
post.success_offer_description: Others can now see your pif.
post.success_request_description: Piffers in your area can now see what you wish for.
post.required_fields_description: Please fill in all required fields and add at least one image.
post.reference_image_description: Upload an image that shows what you wish for or something similar to help piffers understand your wish better.
post.images_description: Upload images of what you want to pif. The first image will be shown in the feed.
post.information_request_description: Describe what you wish for and your preferences
post.information_offer_description: Describe the pif and its characteristics
post.preferences_placeholder: e.g. 'Preferably in red color', 'Must be child-friendly'
post.request_description_tip: Be as specific as possible about what you wish for. This helps piffers understand if they have something that fits your needs.
post.information_tip_request: You don't need to fill in all details. Basic information is enough - more specific details can be discussed when a piffer responds to your wish.
post.information_tip_offer: The more detailed information you provide, the easier it becomes for receivers to understand if the pif suits their needs.
post.add_reference_image: Add reference image showing what you wish for
post.drag_drop_image: Drag and drop an image here or click to select
post.not_logged_in_description: You must be logged in to create a pif or request.
post.pif_updated_demo_description: Your changes have been saved (demo mode).
post.request_created_description: Others can now see what you're looking for.
post.request_created_demo_description: Others can now see what you're looking for (demo mode).
post.pif_created_description: Others can now see your pif.
post.pif_created_demo_description: Others can now see your pif (demo mode).
post.error_demo: Something went wrong in demo mode.
post.error_saving: Something went wrong while saving your pif.
post.error_location: Problem with location data. Try selecting a different address.
post.address_error: Could not determine your address. Please enter it manually.
post.location_access_error: Could not access your location. Please enter your address manually.
post.address_locate_error: Could not locate the address on the map. Please verify the address.
